title: replace now_rfc3339 hand-rolled calendar with chrono
description: now_rfc3339() in client_task.rs is 35 lines: manual Unix-seconds decomposition plus a full Gregorian calendar algorithm (days_to_ymd, ported from Howard Hinnant's date library). This is a maintenance burden and a source of subtle correctness risk (the era computation uses signed/unsigned casts that must be manually audited). Suggested rewrite: add chrono to the egui crate's Cargo.toml and replace the entire function with chrono::Utc::now().format("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ").to_string(). If chrono is already an indirect dependency it costs nothing extra; if not, it is a well-audited, widely-used crate that is the standard Rust answer for this operation.
